# Benchmark Flooring LLC

> Mobile flooring installation for Northeast Ohio homeowners who want straight answers, skilled work, and a better in-home experience. Carpet, tile and stone, luxury vinyl plank, laminate, and hardwood.

## Business facts
- Business: Benchmark Flooring LLC
- Location: Medina, OH
- Phone: (234) 350-9272
- Service area: Medina County, Ohio, Summit County, Ohio, Wayne County, Ohio, Stark County, Ohio, Greater Akron Area, Ohio, West Side Cleveland Suburbs, Ohio, Surrounding Northeast Ohio communities, Ohio

## Services / offerings
- Carpet
- Tile and Stone
- Luxury Vinyl Plank and Laminate
- Hardwood

## Common questions
- What areas does Benchmark Flooring serve? We serve homeowners across Northeast Ohio, including Medina, Summit, Wayne and Stark counties, the greater Akron area, and the west-side Cleveland suburbs.
- What types of flooring do you install? We install carpet, tile and stone, luxury vinyl plank, laminate, and hardwood flooring.
- Do you offer free in-home estimates? Yes. We bring samples and guidance to your home so you can compare options where the floor will actually live, then provide a clear estimate. Request one through our quote form.
- Why choose an in-home estimate over a showroom? You get to judge color, texture, and fit under your own lighting and against your own walls and furnishings, which makes the decision easier and more accurate than a showroom.

## Contact
Call (234) 350-9272 for more information.
